film.title: Holiday
film.overview: Virat Bakshi, an Indian army soldier on vacation stumbles upon a terror plot to rip Mumbai apart with a series of bomb blasts and must hunt down the sleeper cell of the terror organisation before it's too late.

dialogues.dialogue: In every field, if you work sincerely, you get promoted. But only in army and police..You get retirement. And that's a shame. Hi, Virat. - Hi. Even/things ready.
